ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the example (or post) the comment is associated with */,
  "sub_id" TEXT /* Subreddit or category identifier the comment belongs to */,
  "created_utc" REAL /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score reflecting upvotes or downvotes */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who posted the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threading) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been deleted */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Marks the comment as spam */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  "last_modified_utc" REAL /* Timestamp for the last modification of the comment */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Current moderation status of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sub_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_id") REFERENCES subreddits ("sub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subreddits" (
  "sub_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subreddit or category */,
  "sub_name" TEXT /* Name of the subreddit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subreddit */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit moderator */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subreddit is archived */,
  "created_utc" REAL /* Timestamp for when the subreddit was created */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the subreddit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subreddits_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the score is associated with */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the comment */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the score */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (upvote or downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that received a reply */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_seen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been seen by the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reply, mention) */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
